build.buildCommand: rm -f public/hot; composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist --no-dev; npm install; npm run build; rm -f public/hot

deploy.startCommand: rm -f public/hot; php artisan optimize:clear; php artisan storage:link 2>/dev/null; php artisan migrate --force --seed; php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
